title: mentha sylvestris subsp. calliantha
intro: Mentha sylvestris subsp. calliantha, also known as wild mint or Cornish mint, is a subspecies of mint native to the UK and Ireland. It is a hardy perennial herb with a distinctive, peppery mint flavor and aroma, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Mentha sylvestris subsp. calliantha include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of nausea, indigestion, and bloating, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve mood.
